summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Build and continuously improve {prog|onboarding curriculum} across live and async formats, reducing {ex|new-hire} ramp time by 75% for 70+ staff
Facilitate {prog|training} webinars for 600+ participants, designing engaging sessions that boost product fluency and a 78% program enrollment rate
Partner with {cross|subject-matter experts} to develop guides and documentation that translate complex concepts into clear, practical learning
Manage {coord|program logistics}—scheduling, coordination, and end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ programs—tracking feedback to iterate and improve
Optimized {ex|onboarding processes for new hires} across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across projects in employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Strengthened {ex|belonging} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Equipped managers through a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports and guidance
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to track {data|engagement outcomes} and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
